text: The sense of verses 6-13 is by no means certain; the first three names in verse 7 may have been copied by error from verses 4 and 5 above. In verse 11, the Latin represents the words ‘by Husim’ as a single word, ‘Mehusim’.
Semei should probably be identified with the Sama of verse 13.

It is difficult to believe that all these clan chiefs resided in the city of Jerusalem; perhaps we should understand, here and in verse 32, that the Benjamites remained politically attached to Juda, when the kingdom was divided.
